sections.paragraph:
ὑπηρέτης, ου, ὁ [ὑπό, ἐρέτης ‘rower’ fr. ἐρέσσω ‘row’] ‘one who renders service’, context-specific, helper, attendant

—a. in varying official or assigned capacity Mt 5:25; 26:58; Mk 14:65; Lk 4:20; J 7:32 and oft. in J; Ac 5:22, 26.

—b. in matters involving the dissemination of the Jesus story or cause of Christ Lk 1:2; Ac 13:5; 26:16; 1 Cor 4:1.
